player_notes.luka doncic: OUT for at least the rest of the regular season with a Grade 2 hamstring strain; playoff status listed as uncertain. Fade all Doncic props; expect elevated usage for Lakers teammates.
player_notes.stephen curry: Expected to be cleared to return Sunday vs. Rockets after missing 27 games with a right knee issue. Monitor official activation; if confirmed, significant boost to his props and potential negative impact on Warriors teammates' usage.
player_notes.giannis antetokounmpo: Being held out by the Bucks despite Giannis publicly stating he is healthy; NBA investigating the situation. Availability for tonight's game vs. Memphis highly uncertain — avoid Giannis props until official status confirmed.
player_notes.karl-anthony towns: Sat out Friday vs. Bulls with a right elbow impingement. Monitor status for today's game; if out again, boosts rebounds/scoring props for Knicks frontcourt teammates.

game_notes.LAL vs DAL: Luka Doncic (Lakers) is out for the rest of the regular season. Expect increased usage and opportunity for LeBron James and other Lakers guards/wings.
game_notes.HOU vs GSW: Stephen Curry expected to return Sunday for Golden State vs. Houston; if activated, significant rotation change for Warriors and potential minutes reduction for his replacements.
game_notes.MEM vs MIL: Giannis Antetokounmpo's availability is in serious doubt amid a public dispute with the Bucks organization and an NBA investigation; fade Giannis props and consider elevated usage for Bucks supporting cast if he is ruled out.
